steps.title: Read the requested bar
steps.content: The graph labels the gifts A, B, C, and D along the horizontal axis. The question asks for gift C, so use only the bar above C.

steps.title: Match the height
steps.content: The bar for gift C reaches $18$ volunteers. The total $43$ volunteers is context, but no subtraction is needed because the graph gives the count directly.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A, $3$, is the count for gift D.
  • Choice B, $8$, is the count for gift B.
  • Choice C, $14$, is the count for gift A.
  • Choice D, $18$, is the count for gift C. Correct.
That matches choice D.
